allow: Bash(node -e "const l = require\('./node_modules/lucide-react'\); const keys = Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => /share|link|globe|network|rss|at|hash|signal|broadcast|social|x$/i.test\(k\)\); console.log\(keys.join\('\\n'\)\)")
Bash(bun -e "import * as l from 'lucide-react'; const keys = Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => /share|link|globe|network|rss|at|hash|signal|x$/i.test\(k\)\); console.log\(keys.join\('\\n'\)\)")

Bash(bun -e "import * as l from 'lucide-react'; const keys = Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => /^\(Camera|Image|Globe|Share|Users|MessageCircle|Radio|Rss|Feather|Send|AtSign|X\)$/.test\(k\)\); console.log\(keys.sort\(\).join\('\\n'\)\)")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Host "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $r.Content | Select-String -Pattern "error|Error|ENOENT" -SimpleMatch | Select-Object -First 10 } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })
PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $response = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -Method Get -TimeoutSec 15 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Page loaded OK, length=$\($response.Length\)")
